name: salesforce-launcher
title: SF Orgs
description: Quickly browse and open Salesforce CLI-authenticated orgs
author: bl4ckk

commands.name: search-orgs
commands.title: Browse Salesforce Orgs
commands.subtitle: Search local Salesforce CLI authorizations
commands.description: Browse and open orgs authenticated with Salesforce CLI

commands.name: launch-org
commands.title: Open Salesforce Org
commands.subtitle: Jump straight to an authenticated org
commands.description: Open a Salesforce org by alias or username

preferences.name: sfPath
preferences.title: Salesforce CLI Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the sf executable. Leave empty to detect it automatically.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
